gm60_init_i2c.message0:
Initialize QR code scanner (I2C) %1
Address %2
Use %3
gm60_init_i2c.tooltip: Initialize DFRobot GM60 QR code scanner module through I2C

gm60_init_uart.message0: Initialize QR code scanner (serial port) %1 RX pin %2 TX pin %3
gm60_init_uart.tooltip: Initialize the DFRobot GM60 QR code scanner module through the UART serial port and specify the RX and TX pins

gm60_set_encode.message0: QR code scanner %1 sets the encoding to %2
gm60_set_encode.tooltip: Set the encoding format of the QR code scanner output data

gm60_setup_code.message0: QR code scanner %1 %2 Setting code %3 Output the setting code content
gm60_setup_code.tooltip: Set code configuration, you can change the value of the chip register by scanning the QR code

gm60_set_identify.tooltip: Set the recognition type of QR code/barcode, supporting QR Code, EAN13, Code128, etc.

gm60_reset.message0: QR code scanner %1 Restore factory settings
gm60_reset.tooltip: Restore QR code scanner to factory settings

gm60_detection.message0: QR code scanner %1 reads scanned data
gm60_detection.tooltip: Detect and return the scanned QR code/barcode data as a string
